title: The Lion in Love
lines: A fierce Lion fell in love with a beautiful maiden.
He begged her to marry him, but she was afraid of his teeth and claws.
'If you will draw your teeth and cut off your claws," said she, 'then I will marry you.'
The foolish Lion agreed and did as she asked.
When he returned, she laughed at him and drove him away.
He had lost the very things that made him a lion, and now he was helpless.
moral: Never surrender your strengths for love.
